_meta.description: This file contains a serialized version of schema entities for drift.

sql.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "app_settings" ("key" TEXT NOT NULL, "value" TEXT NOT NULL, "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("key"));
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "schema_metadata" ("key" TEXT NOT NULL, "value" TEXT NOT NULL, "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("key"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "areas" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "description" TEXT NULL, "icon_key" TEXT NULL, "color_value" INTEGER NULL, "status" TEXT NOT NULL, "sort_order" INTEGER NOT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "archived_at" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "goals" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "title" TEXT NOT NULL, "description" TEXT NULL, "area_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES areas (id), "parent_goal_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES goals (id), "goal_type" TEXT NULL, "time_horizon" TEXT NULL, "measurement_type" TEXT NULL, "target_value" REAL NULL, "current_value" REAL NULL, "unit" TEXT NULL, "start_at" TEXT NULL, "deadline_at" TEXT NULL, "priority" INTEGER NULL, "status" TEXT NOT NULL, "motivation" TEXT NULL, "review_frequency" TEXT NULL, "last_review_at" TEXT NULL, "next_review_at" TEXT NULL, "notes" TEXT NULL, "custom_fields_json" TEXT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "archived_at" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "projects" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "title" TEXT NOT NULL, "description" TEXT NULL, "area_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES areas (id), "goal_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES goals (id), "status" TEXT NOT NULL, "start_at" TEXT NULL, "deadline_at" TEXT NULL, "progress" REAL NULL, "notes" TEXT NULL, "custom_fields_json" TEXT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "archived_at" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "milestones" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "title" TEXT NOT NULL, "description" TEXT NULL, "goal_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES goals (id), "project_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES projects (id), "due_at" TEXT NULL, "status" TEXT NOT NULL, "completed_at" TEXT NULL, "sort_order" INTEGER NOT NULL, "notes" TEXT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "archived_at" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "tasks" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "title" TEXT NOT NULL, "description" TEXT NULL, "area_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES areas (id), "goal_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES goals (id), "project_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES projects (id), "milestone_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES milestones (id), "parent_task_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES tasks (id), "status" TEXT NOT NULL, "priority" TEXT NOT NULL, "energy_requirement" TEXT NOT NULL, "estimated_duration_minutes" INTEGER NULL, "actual_duration_minutes" INTEGER NULL, "due_at" TEXT NULL, "scheduled_start_at" TEXT NULL, "scheduled_end_at" TEXT NULL, "preferred_time_of_day" TEXT NULL, "completed_at" TEXT NULL, "notes" TEXT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "archived_at" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "tags" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "color_value" INTEGER NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "archived_at" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "entity_tags" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "entity_type" TEXT NOT NULL, "entity_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "tag_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES tags (id), "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "notes" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "title" TEXT NOT NULL, "content" TEXT NOT NULL, "content_format" TEXT NOT NULL, "is_pinned" INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK ("is_pinned" IN (0, 1)), "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "archived_at" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "note_links" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "note_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES notes (id), "entity_type" TEXT NOT NULL, "entity_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "relationship_type" TEXT NOT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "planner_events" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "title" TEXT NOT NULL, "description" TEXT NULL, "kind" TEXT NOT NULL, "starts_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "ends_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "is_all_day" INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK ("is_all_day" IN (0, 1)), "location" TEXT NULL, "meeting_url" TEXT NULL, "linked_task_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES tasks (id), "recurrence_rule" TEXT NULL, "reminder_policy" TEXT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "archived_at" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "time_blocks" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "title" TEXT NOT NULL, "kind" TEXT NOT NULL, "starts_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "ends_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "linked_task_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES tasks (id), "notes" TEXT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "archived_at" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "focus_sessions" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "task_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES tasks (id), "planned_duration_minutes" INTEGER NOT NULL, "actual_duration_minutes" INTEGER NULL, "started_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "ended_at" TEXT NULL, "status" TEXT NOT NULL, "notes" TEXT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "archived_at" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "spaces" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "description" TEXT NULL, "icon_key" TEXT NULL, "color_value" INTEGER NULL, "sort_order" INTEGER NOT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "archived_at" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "space_record_types" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "space_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES spaces (id), "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "description" TEXT NULL, "sort_order" INTEGER NOT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "archived_at" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "space_fields" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "record_type_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES space_record_types (id), "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "field_key" TEXT NOT NULL, "field_type" TEXT NOT NULL, "is_required" INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK ("is_required" IN (0, 1)), "sort_order" INTEGER NOT NULL, "options_json" TEXT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "archived_at" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "space_statuses" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "record_type_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES space_record_types (id), "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "color_value" INTEGER NULL, "sort_order" INTEGER NOT NULL, "is_default" INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK ("is_default" IN (0, 1)), "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "archived_at" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "space_records" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "record_type_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES space_record_types (id), "title" TEXT NOT NULL, "status_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES space_statuses (id), "fields_json" TEXT NOT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "archived_at" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "space_record_links" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "source_record_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES space_records (id), "target_type" TEXT NOT NULL, "target_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "relationship_type" TEXT NOT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "space_saved_filters" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "space_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES spaces (id), "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "filter_json" TEXT NOT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "space_saved_views" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "space_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES spaces (id), "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "view_type" TEXT NOT NULL, "config_json" TEXT NOT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "template_installations" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "template_key" TEXT NOT NULL, "template_version" TEXT NOT NULL, "installed_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "configuration_snapshot_json" TEXT NOT NULL, "status" TEXT NOT NULL, "uninstall_choice" TEXT NULL, "uninstalled_at" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "reminder_rules" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "owner_type" TEXT NULL, "owner_id" TEXT NULL, "category" TEXT NOT NULL, "title" TEXT NOT NULL, "body" TEXT NOT NULL, "scheduled_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "enabled" INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK ("enabled" IN (0, 1)), "recurrence_value" TEXT NULL, "platform_notification_id" INTEGER NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "canceled_at" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "notification_inbox" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "reminder_rule_id" TEXT NULL, "owner_type" TEXT NULL, "owner_id" TEXT NULL, "category" TEXT NOT NULL, "title" TEXT NOT NULL, "body" TEXT NOT NULL, "scheduled_at" TEXT NULL, "delivered_at" TEXT NULL, "read_at" TEXT NULL, "canceled_at" TEXT NULL, "platform_notification_id" INTEGER NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));
